cell_level_scores._comment: Populated only for single-cell-resolution tasks once the cell-level score file is supplied. Do not derive from method_scores — domain-level and cell-level scores are negatively correlated for several methods.

_reconciliation_note: overall_ranks.csv contains 42 methods; manuscript evaluates 40. Extra methods vs. manuscript: ['DECIPHER (cell)', 'FuseMap (cell)', 'Nicheformer']. These are kept in method_scores but flagged here.
